content.query:
SELECT
[lds_id]
,[cst_id]
,[FirstName]
,[LastName]
,[Address1]
,[Address2]
,[City]
,[State]
,[Zip]
,[Zip4]
,[Phone]
,[phone2]
,[phone3]
,[Email]
,[src_id]
,[Descr]
,[Productid]
,[EntryDate]
,[ApptDate]
,[EverSet]
,[EverConfirmed]
,[EverIssued]
,[EverNetIssued]
,[EverSat]
,[Sold]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_TCT_ClientLeads]
 WHERE
 Productid = 'Coat'
 and ClientID in ('i417db','a5b5db','yy72db')
